title: vitis vulpina var. rotundifolia
intro: Vitis vulpina var. rotundifolia, also known as the grapevine of the woods or wood grape, is a type of grapevine that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Vitis vulpina var. rotundifolia include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
